jsonLd.title: Haldiram's is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Haldiram's is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haldiram's:
Haldiram's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's!
